name: Native Scheduler
description: Cross-platform native scheduler plugin for OpenClaw.

defaultBackend.label: Default Backend
defaultBackend.help: Scheduler backend to prefer. 'auto' chooses based on platform.

namespace.label: Job Namespace
namespace.help: Optional prefix used when naming managed scheduler jobs.

dataDir.label: Job Data Directory
dataDir.help: Optional directory for wrapper runner state files (health, latest run, run history).
